'''Pallas Quintell''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agent working on the planet [[Kallistas]] during the times of the Empire. A former [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] for [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Jondrell Inx]], Quintell decided to leave Inx's crew and join the Rebel Alliance due to the depth of his beliefs. Although Inx did not share his objectives, they remained in good terms, both of them working in the area of Kallistas.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Quintell was active on Kallistas, which made him unpopular to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]]. Rinn posted a reward for Quintell's head, which was obtained by novice bounty hunters [[Sirenas Firil]] and [[Chandrex Grenn]]. After Quintell's capture, Inx occupied his base, with Quintell knowing it.
